positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for stranger_things_pos.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for stranger_things_pos.tptp
1. netflix_show(stranger_things) & popular(stranger_things) [input(axiom)]
2. ! [X0] : ((netflix_show(X0) & popular(X0)) => binge_watch(X0)) [input(axiom)]
6. ! [X0] : (binge_watch(X0) => share_with_lisa(X0)) [input(axiom)]
8. share_with_lisa(stranger_things) [input(conjecture)]
9. ~share_with_lisa(stranger_things) [negated conjecture 8]
10. ~share_with_lisa(stranger_things) [flattening 9]
11. ! [X0] : (binge_watch(X0) | (~netflix_show(X0) | ~popular(X0))) [ennf transformation 2]
12. ! [X0] : (binge_watch(X0) | ~netflix_show(X0) | ~popular(X0)) [flattening 11]
14. ! [X0] : (share_with_lisa(X0) | ~binge_watch(X0)) [ennf transformation 6]
16. popular(stranger_things) [cnf transformation 1]
17. netflix_show(stranger_things) [cnf transformation 1]
18. ~popular(X0) | ~netflix_show(X0) | binge_watch(X0) [cnf transformation 12]
23. ~binge_watch(X0) | share_with_lisa(X0) [cnf transformation 14]
25. ~share_with_lisa(stranger_things) [cnf transformation 10]
26. ~netflix_show(stranger_things) | binge_watch(stranger_things) [resolution 18,16]
27. binge_watch(stranger_things) [forward subsumption resolution 26,17]
28. share_with_lisa(stranger_things) [resolution 27,23]
29. $false [forward subsumption resolution 28,25]
% SZS output end Proof for stranger_things_pos.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for stranger_things_neg.tptp

    stranger_things != black_mirror).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    binge_watch(stranger_things)).

cnf(u19,axiom,

cnf(u28,axiom,
